scripts.dev: node scripts/patch-dev-plist.js && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && FOCANA_DEV=1 electron ."
scripts.dev:first-run: node scripts/patch-dev-plist.js && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "vite" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && FOCANA_DEV=1 FOCANA_FORCE_LICENSE_GATE=1 FOCANA_RESET_LICENSE=1 electron ."
scripts.build:mac:release: npm run build:renderer && node scripts/mac-release.js full --require-notarization
scripts.build:mac:publish: npm run build:renderer && node scripts/mac-release.js full --publish always --require-notarization
scripts.build:mac:notarize: npm run build:renderer && node scripts/mac-release.js zip --require-notarization
scripts.build:mac:notarize:full: npm run build:renderer && node scripts/mac-release.js full --require-notarization
scripts.build:mac:notarize:universal: npm run build:renderer && node scripts/mac-release.js universal --require-notarization
